ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "emp_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "salary" REAL /* Current salary of the employee */,
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the employee belongs to */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact name */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Emergency contact phone number */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the employee */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the employee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "dept_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "dept_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the department */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department's responsibilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dept_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payrolls" (
  "payroll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payroll record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "pay_date" TEXT /* Date of the payroll processing */,
  "gross_pay" REAL /* Gross salary before deductions */,
  "net_pay" REAL /* Net salary after all deductions */,
  "deductions" REAL /* Total deductions from the salary */,
  "tax_deductions" REAL /* Tax deductions from the salary */,
  "health_insurance_deductions" REAL /* Health insurance deductions from the salary */,
  "retirement_contributions" REAL /* Retirement contributions from the salary */,
  "pay_period" TEXT /* Pay period (e.g., bi-weekly, monthly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payroll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payrolls_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance review */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee being reviewed */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was conducted */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score awarded to the employee */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the employee's performance */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer */,
  "next_review_date" TEXT /* Date of the next performance review */,
  "improvement_areas" TEXT /* Areas for improvement noted in the review */,
  "goals" TEXT /* Goals set for the next review period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_reviews_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of attendance (e.g., Present, Absent) */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks for the attendance entry */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Time the employee checked in */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Time the employee checked out */,
  "hours_worked" REAL /* Total hours worked for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_attendance_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "benefits" (
  "benefit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each benefit record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "benefit_type" TEXT /* Type of benefit (e.g., Health, Retirement) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the benefit */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the benefit */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the benefit (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "benefit_cost" REAL /* Cost of the benefit */,
  "benefit_provider" TEXT /* Provider of the benefit */,
  "benefit_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the benefit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("benefit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_benefits_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salaries" (
  "salary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the salary became effective */,
  "salary_amount" REAL /* Amount of the salary */,
  "salary_grade" TEXT /* Salary grade of the employee */,
  "salary_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of salary payments (e.g., monthly, bi-weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salaries_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Manager, Staff) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role's responsibilities */,
  "role_level" TEXT /* Level of the role (e.g., Junior, Senior) */,
  "role_dept_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_roles_role_dept_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_dept_id") REFERENCES departments ("dept_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_roles" (
  "emp_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned */,
  "assign_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was ended */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the role change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_roles_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaves" (
  "leave_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leave request */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee requesting leave */,
  "leave_type" TEXT /* Type of leave (e.g., Sick, Vacation) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the leave */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the leave */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the leave request (e.g., Approved, Denied) */,
  "approver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the person who approved the leave */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the leave */,
  "total_days" INTEGER /* Total number of leave days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leave_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaves_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaves_approver_id FOREIGN KEY ("approver_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "training_courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the training course */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course content */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the course in hours */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor */,
  "course_cost" REAL /* Cost of the course */,
  "course_location" TEXT /* Location where the course is held */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_training_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_training" (
  "emp_training_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each training record */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee who completed the training */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the training course */,
  "completion_date" TEXT /* Date when the course was completed */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade or performance in the training */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback on the training */,
  "certificate" TEXT /* Certificate issued for the training */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("emp_training_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES training_courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_training_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "emp_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the notification was sent */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., Salary Update, Training Reminder) */,
  "read_status" TEXT /* Read status of the notification (e.g., Read, Unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_emp_id FOREIGN KEY ("emp_id") REFERENCES employees ("emp_id")
)
